title: scolodrys lyrata
intro: Scolodrys lyrata, also known as Lycopodiopsida, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Scolopodiaceae, commonly referred to as club moss. Traditionally, Scolodrys lyrata has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The plant is also known to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood sugar levels, and has been used to treat conditions like arthritis and digestive issues. Scolodrys lyrata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and benefits.
